description: An agent has signed a new listing agreement. They need to create the property listing in the MLS.

nodes.task_description: Gather all property details, photos, and the seller's disclosure document.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles all necessary information including property features and required legal documents.

nodes.task_description: Enter all property data into the MLS new listing form.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately fills out all required fields in the MLS system.

nodes.task_description: Upload photos and all required documents (e.g., disclosures, floor plans) to the listing.

expected_outcome.expected: All media and documents are successfully uploaded and attached to the new MLS listing.
